overrides.expect: \boldsymbol {E} = \frac {q}{4 \pi \epsilon_ {0} c ^ {2} r ^ {\prime}} \left[ \begin{array}{l} \text {acceleration of the charge at (t - r^{\prime} /c)} \\ \text {projected at right angles to r^{\prime}} \end{array} \right] \tag {$21.1^{\prime}$}
overrides.new: \boldsymbol{E} = \frac {q}{4\pi \epsilon_{0} c^{2} r^{\prime}} \left[ \begin{array}{l} \text{acceleration of the charge at (t - r'/c)} \\ \text{projected at right angles to r'} \end{array} \right] \tag{21.1'}
